android.widget.TextView.content-desc: 12 Pieces, The Hot-Selling Multi-Purpose Lint Remover Is Here! Sharp Stainless Steel Blades With Pink / Blue / Yellow / Mint Green Color Fresh Shell, Fragrance-Free And Gentle Formula. No Accessories Needed To Cover Eyebrows, Face, Arms, Legs And Other Parts Of The Body, Delicate Blades Fit The Contours Of The Skin, Easy To Remove Stray Hairs, Trimming Hairs. Durable Material + Ergonomic Design, Europe And The United States Pop-Up Full-Body Beauty Tools, A Set Of Fine Hair Removal From Eyebrows To The Body, So That The Frizzy Skin Into Smooth In Seconds, Home Beauty Must-Have!
